evals.prompt: Run a WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit on the application and produce a compliance report
evals.expected_output: Violations sorted by impact with WCAG criteria references, fix code, and remediation roadmap

assertions.text: Output mentions automated tool (axe-core) with WCAG 2.2 tags
Output notes that automated tools catch only 30-40% of issues
Output provides manual testing checklist items
Output categorizes findings by WCAG success criterion
Output provides severity levels (critical/serious/moderate/minor)
Output addresses color contrast specifically
Output addresses keyboard accessibility
Output provides specific code fixes with before/after examples
Output includes WCAG 2.2 new criteria (focus appearance, target size)
Output provides screen reader testing guidance

evals.prompt: Make the custom dropdown component accessible with ARIA roles and keyboard navigation
evals.expected_output: ARIA combobox/listbox implementation with keyboard interaction pattern and screen reader announcements

assertions.text: Output recommends using native HTML select first
Output uses role=combobox on input or trigger
Output uses role=listbox for options container
Output uses role=option for individual options
Output uses aria-expanded on trigger
Output uses aria-activedescendant for active option
Output implements arrow key navigation for options
Output implements Escape key to close
Output addresses focus management on open/close

evals.prompt: Fix the modal dialog to trap focus and be properly announced by screen readers
evals.expected_output: Focus trap implementation with aria-modal, labelledby, and open/close focus management

assertions.text: Output uses role=dialog on modal element
Output uses aria-modal=true
Output uses aria-labelledby referencing dialog title
Output implements focus trap (Tab cycles inside modal)
Output moves focus to first focusable element on open
Output returns focus to trigger element on close
Output implements Escape key to close
Output provides JavaScript focus trap implementation code

evals.prompt: All text in this design system fails color contrast. Propose fixes that maintain brand identity
evals.expected_output: Contrast ratio measurements for all failing pairs with adjusted token values that pass WCAG

assertions.text: Output measures current contrast ratios with calculation or tool reference
Output references WCAG 1.4.3 thresholds (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large)
Output references WCAG 1.4.11 for UI component contrast (3:1)
Output provides specific adjusted color values that pass
Output adjusts at token level (not component level)
Output tests both light and dark mode
Output labels proposed values as [SUPUESTO] requiring designer approval

evals.prompt: Implement focus management for SPA navigation — users report screen reader announces wrong content after route change
evals.expected_output: Route change focus management, screen reader announcer, and skip link implementation

assertions.text: Output implements focus movement to h1 or main content on route change
Output provides aria-live region for route change announcement
Output mentions tabindex=-1 on h1 to allow programmatic focus
Output implements skip-to-content link as first focusable element
Output addresses skip link visibility pattern (visible on focus)
Output addresses setTimeout requirement for announcement firing
Output provides testing guidance for screen reader navigation
